paragraphs: Art is a very special way to share what we feel. A painting, a song, or a dance can say so much. People do not need to speak the same words. Art can tell a story to every person in the world.

Long ago, people made art on the walls of their homes. They drew pictures of animals, trees, and the big sky. These old pictures still teach us about life from long ago. Art helps us keep our old stories safe.
Music is another kind of art that people really love. A soft song can make us feel calm and happy. A loud drum can make us want to dance and clap. Many children learn to play music at a young age.
Every country has its own art and its own music. Some use old songs and some use new sounds too. When we share art, we learn about other people. Art helps all of us feel close to the world.

questions.question_en: What is the main idea of the passage?
choices: Art is a special way to share feelings and stories with everyone.
Only old people like art and music.
Art is only on walls and nowhere else.
questions.correct_answer: Art is a special way to share feelings and stories with everyone.
questions.explanation_en: The passage talks about how art and music help people share feelings and stories.
questions.explanation_ar: يتحدث النص عن كيف يساعد الفن والموسيقى الناس على مشاركة المشاعر والقصص.

questions.question_en: What did people draw on the walls long ago?
questions.question_ar: ماذا رسم الناس على الجدران منذ زمن طويل؟
questions.explanation_en: The passage says people drew pictures of animals, trees, and the sky.
questions.explanation_ar: يقول النص إن الناس رسموا صوراً للحيوانات والأشجار والسماء.

questions.question_en: What can a soft song do?
questions.question_ar: ماذا يمكن أن تفعل أغنية ناعمة؟
choices: Make us feel calm and happy
Make us jump in the sea
questions.correct_answer: Make us feel calm and happy
questions.explanation_en: The passage says a soft song can make us feel calm and happy.
questions.explanation_ar: يقول النص إن الأغنية الناعمة يمكن أن تجعلنا نشعر بالهدوء والسعادة.

questions.explanation_en: 'Painting' is a picture that people make with colors on paper or walls.
questions.explanation_ar: 'Painting' هي صورة يصنعها الناس بالألوان على الورق أو الجدران.

choices: A music tool you hit to make sound
questions.correct_answer: A music tool you hit to make sound
questions.explanation_en: 'Drum' is a music tool you hit with your hands or sticks.
questions.explanation_ar: 'Drum' هي أداة موسيقية تضربها بيديك أو بعصا.

questions.question_en: Why is sharing art a good thing for people?
questions.question_ar: لماذا تعتبر مشاركة الفن شيئاً جيداً للناس؟
choices: It helps us learn about other people and feel close to them.
It makes people work harder all day.
It stops people from eating food.
It makes all art the same.
questions.correct_answer: It helps us learn about other people and feel close to them.
questions.explanation_en: The passage says when we share art we learn about others and feel close.
questions.explanation_ar: يقول النص إنه عندما نشارك الفن نتعلم عن الآخرين ونشعر بالقرب.

paragraphs: Today, many people make art with a computer or a phone. This new kind of art is called digital art. You do not need paper or paint to make it. You just need a good idea and a few tools.
A digital artist can paint on a screen with a pen. The pen feels like a real brush in your hand. You can pick any color you want with just a tap. If you make a wrong line, you can fix it very fast.

Many young artists share their work on the internet. Other people can see the art from every country. They leave kind words and learn new ways to paint. This helps new artists grow and make better art.

Digital art is now used in many places around the world. We see it in books, on phones, and in long movies. It has opened new doors for people who love art. Every day, digital art gets better and more amazing.

questions.question_en: What is the main idea of the passage?
choices: Digital art is a new way to make and share art.
Only old artists make digital art.
Digital art is not used in books.
Paper and paint are better than computers.
questions.correct_answer: Digital art is a new way to make and share art.
questions.explanation_en: The passage is about how digital art is new and lets people share their work.
questions.explanation_ar: يدور النص حول كيف أن الفن الرقمي جديد ويتيح للناس مشاركة أعمالهم.

questions.question_en: What does a digital artist use to paint on a screen?
questions.question_ar: ماذا يستخدم الفنان الرقمي للرسم على الشاشة؟
choices: A pen that feels like a brush
questions.correct_answer: A pen that feels like a brush
questions.explanation_en: The passage says a digital artist paints on a screen with a pen that feels like a brush.
questions.explanation_ar: يقول النص إن الفنان الرقمي يرسم على الشاشة بقلم يشبه الفرشاة.

questions.question_en: Where do young artists share their work?
questions.explanation_en: The passage says many young artists share their work on the internet.
questions.explanation_ar: يقول النص إن العديد من الفنانين الشباب يشاركون أعمالهم على الإنترنت.

choices: Made with a computer or phone
questions.correct_answer: Made with a computer or phone
questions.explanation_en: 'Digital' means made with a computer or phone, not with paper.
questions.explanation_ar: 'Digital' تعني مصنوعة بجهاز كمبيوتر أو هاتف، وليس بالورق.

questions.explanation_en: 'Brush' is the small tool artists use to put paint on a canvas.
questions.explanation_ar: 'Brush' هي الأداة الصغيرة التي يستخدمها الفنانون لوضع الطلاء على القماش.

questions.question_en: Why has digital art opened new doors for artists?
questions.question_ar: لماذا فتح الفن الرقمي أبواباً جديدة للفنانين؟
choices: It lets them share their work with people all over the world.
It makes them work only at night.
It stops them from drawing at all.
questions.correct_answer: It lets them share their work with people all over the world.
questions.explanation_en: The passage says digital art lets artists share and learn new ways to paint.
questions.explanation_ar: يقول النص إن الفن الرقمي يتيح للفنانين المشاركة وتعلم طرق جديدة للرسم.
